page_content: ENGX414 Presentations of London in Modern European Literature and Film (3 Credits) London has been the largest European city for the last two-and-a-half centuries and has played a dominant role in European culture since that time. This course explores the ways in which this idea is presented in examples of literature and ﬁlm from the late nineteenth century to the present day. Additional Information: This course is offered as part of the Arts & Humanities-in-London study abroad program. Students must apply for this program through Education Abroad: More information at https:// globalmaryland.umd.edu/ofﬁces/education-abroad/program/11854. Education Abroad processes registrations for this course on behalf of students.
